executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 84 threat advisories. Of these, 4 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 40 as HIGH risk. 4 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
